headline: Parker Hannifin Aerospace Records Highlight Backlog Strength And Valuation Questions
summary: Parker-Hannifin (NYSE:PH) reported record revenue and operating margin in its Aerospace Systems segment in Q2 FY2026. The segment also recorded significant organic growth and a record backlog in the quarter. Management highlighted continued execution of the company’s Win Strategy under CEO Jenny Parmentier. Parker-Hannifin’s Aerospace Systems segment sits at the heart of the company’s motion and control portfolio, supplying critical components and systems to aircraft manufacturers and...

headline: Parker-Hannifin (PH) Valuation Check After Mixed Short And Long Term Share Returns
summary: What Parker-Hannifin’s Recent Performance Signals for Investors Parker-Hannifin (PH) has drawn fresh attention after a mixed stretch in its share performance, with a 1 day return of 2.04%, a 7 day gain of 3.50%, and a month decline of 9.55%. Over the past 3 months the stock shows a 4.15% return, alongside a 34.26% year to date total return and a 43.26% 1 year total return. This places the recent volatility in the context of a stronger multi period backdrop. See our latest analysis for...
